title: Fiery Fresh Mexican Pistachio Paste Horchata
description: A winey, springy, and energizing Mexican horchata made with pistachio paste, bhuna, and a hint of spice. Perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine the pistachio paste, bhuna chutney, coconut milk, water, vanilla extract, cinnamon powder, and cayenne pepper.
Blend the mixture until smooth and creamy, stopping to scrape down the sides of the blender as needed.
Add the sugar and blend until well combined.
Taste and adjust the sweetness and spice level to your liking.
Cover the blender and refrigerate the mixture for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, add the ice cubes to the blender and blend until the mixture is slushy and chilled.
Pour the horchata into glasses and garnish with pistachio shavings, if desired.
